Trait_1.name: Elite Foe: Malicous Mage
Trait_1.desc: This character cannot be Stunned and markers they have generated cannot be removed. Be sure to inform players of this before beginnig the encounter.

Trait_2.name: Combo
Trait_2.desc: Attack using Reaping Cut, then perform Slashing Scythe or Void Orb

Trait_3.name: Til Death Do Us Part
Trait_3.desc: When within 4 squares of Avere Braveheart gain Revivify(5) and Critical Up(3)

Trait_4.name: Blood Rune
Trait_4.desc: Whenever Edda Blackblossom uses Red Wedding, add 1d6 to the damage roll of that ability for each Blood Rune stack.

Base Effect.desc: Deals 10 Damage to all targets in range

Direct Hit.desc: Deals an additional 2d6 Damage and inflicts DOT(3)

Marker Trigger.desc: At the end of the targets next turn

Marker Base Effect.desc: Deals 1d6 damage to all Targets in a 3x3 area

Ability_3.name: Slashing Scythe

Base Effect.desc: Deals 1d6+10 Damage to all targets in range

Marker Trigger.desc: At the start of this character's next turn

Ability_3.extra_text: Place this marker on either the left or right at random

Range.desc: 6 Squares away from the Target of this ability

Base Effect.desc: Summon a Wedding Corpse to the Encounter. This Wedding Corpse cannot act normally and is immune to all CC effects. The target of this ability is Binded and cannot move until the Wedding Corpse is killed. At the start of every turn, the Wedding Corpse must move 1 square towards the target. If the Wedding Corpse makes it to the Target, they suffer 2d6 damage and are enfeebled with Undeath for 2 rounds. Edda gains a charge of Blood Rune * Undeath Effect: Any healing action on the target instead deals damage.
Deals 2d6 + 1d6 for every Blood Rune charge

Trait_1.name: Til Death Do Us Par
Trait_1.desc: When within 4 squares of Edda Blackblossom gain Revivify(5) and Critical Up(3)

Trait_2.name: Elite Foe: Undead Voidsent
Trait_2.desc: This character cannot be Stunned and markers they have generated cannot be removed. Be sure to inform players of this before beginning the encounter.

Base Effect.desc: Deals 10 Damage to the target and restores 10 health to Avere Bravearm

Direct Hit.desc: Deals an additional 1d6 Damage and restores that amount of health

Marker Area.desc: 3x stationary 2x10 area centered on the target.

Target.desc: All enemies within the marker area

Marker Trigger.desc: At the start of this character's next turn

Marker Effect.desc: Deals 4d6 Damage to all targets in range. Inflicts DOT(3) to all targets in range

Range.desc: 6 squares away from the target of this ability.

Base Effect.desc: Summon a 3x Wedding Corpse to the Encounter. These Wedding Corpses cannot act normally and is immune to all CC effects. At the start of every turn, the Wedding Corpse must move 2 squares towards the target. If a Wedding Corpse makes it to the Target. Edda Blackblossom gains a stack of Blood Rune

Direct Hit.desc: Inflicts a cleansable Disease for 2 turns.

Trait_1.name: Elite Foe: Undead Voidsent
Trait_1.desc: This character cannot be Stunned and markers they have generated cannot be removed. Be sure to inform players of this before beginnig the encounter.

Trait_2.name: Blood Rune
Trait_2.desc: Whenever Edda the Consumed uses Black Honeymoon, add 1d6 to the damage roll of that ability for each Blood Rune stack.

Trait_3.name: Doom
Trait_3.desc: Whenever Edda the Consumed reaches 100 HP. Inflict Doom(2) to all party members. * Doom Effect: After (x) amount of rounds, reduce the afflicted targets HP to 0 instantly at the start of their turn.

Marker Area.desc: An inverted 3x3 area OR a 4x4 area centered on the Origin.

Base Effect.desc: Deals 10 Damage to all targets in range and grants Edda the Consumed a Blood Rune for each target hit

Marker Trigger.desc: At the start of this character's next turn

Direct Hit.desc: Deals an additional 2d6 Damage and inflicts a DOT(3)

Marker Area.desc: 3x mobile 3x3 Areas that move 1 square every turn.

Base Effect.desc: Deals 10 + 2d6 Damage to all targets in range and grants Edda the Consumed a Blood Rune for each target hit

Marker Trigger.desc: At the start of this character's next turn

Direct Hit.desc: Deals an additional 2d6 Damage and inflicts a DOT(3)

Marker Trigger.desc: At the end of the target's next turn

Marker Base Effect.desc: Deals 1d6 damage to all Targets in a 3x3 area. Destroys any Wedding Corpses at 0 HP in the area

Base Effect.desc: Deal (5 + 2d6) + 1d6 for every Blood Rune charge

Range.desc: 8 squares away from the Target of this ability

Base Effect.desc: Summon 3x Wedding Corpse to the Encounter. This Wedding Corpse cannot be killed normally and is immune to all CC effects. If hit by the Resolution marker effect when it's HP is 0, remove this Wedding Corpse from the encounter
